ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agricultural_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data was collected */,
  "quad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quadrant where the data was collected */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop species */,
  "fiasp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fertilization method */,
  "cond_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil condition */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES crop_species ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_cond_id FOREIGN KEY ("cond_id") REFERENCES soil_conditions ("cond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_quad_id FOREIGN KEY ("quad_id") REFERENCES quadrants ("quad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_fiasp_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiasp_id") REFERENCES fertilization ("fiasp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quadrants" (
  "quad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quadrant */,
  "quad_number" INTEGER /* Quadrant number where the data was collected */,
  "quad_name" TEXT /* Name of the quadrant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the quadrant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quadrant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_species" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop species */,
  "spec_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the crop species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertilization" (
  "fiasp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertilization method */,
  "fiasp_name" TEXT /* Name of the fertilization method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fertilization method */,
  "application_rate" REAL /* Application rate of the fertilization method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiasp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_conditions" (
  "cond_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil condition */,
  "cond_name" TEXT /* Name of the soil condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the soil condition */,
  "pH_level" REAL /* pH level of the soil condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cond_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop size */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Size range of the crop size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the research team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the research team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being shared */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team sharing the data */,
  "shared_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)
